text: Maya Chen, GP at Lightfield Capital, wants to meet you this week — I told her about your 3x QoQ growth and she's keen. Heads up: they're wrapping a new fund, so she moves fast.
Acme Ventures — it's been 9 days since the partner meeting. They said they'd 'circle back internally' and have gone quiet since. No reply to my last email.
Partner liked the wedge and the founder-market fit. Before taking it to the full partnership, he asked for net revenue retention and the cohort retention curves.
I'm in for $100k whenever you open the round — just send me the SAFE and I'll sign this week.
Cold note — saw your launch on X, looks interesting. Could you send over your deck?
Recurring: block to write the monthly investor update, Friday 4pm.
